title: alchemilla vulgaris var. squarrulosa
intro: Alchemilla vulgaris var. squarrulosa, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a perennial plant species belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is widely used in herbal medicine due to its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Lady's Mantle include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing, providing relief from conditions such as hemorrhoids, diarrhea, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Lady's Mantle can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the affected areas to experience its health benefits.
